key_dungeons.name: Crumbling Vaults
key_dungeons.description: A spiral staircase carved from bedrock descends into Crumbling Vaults. The temperature drops with every step.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Venture into Crumbling Vaults and liberate the Amethyst Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The artifact pulses with ancient energy.

key_dungeons.name: Frozen Halls
key_dungeons.description: Moss-covered statues flank the entrance to Frozen Halls. Their blank eyes seem to follow you.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Explore Frozen Halls and recover the lost Opal Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The artifact was hidden here long ago by a forgotten order.

key_dungeons.name: Obsidian Pit
key_dungeons.description: A rusted iron gate bars the path into Obsidian Pit. It swings open with a tortured groan at your touch.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Search Obsidian Pit for the hidden Crystal Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Rumors say it was sealed away behind deadly traps.

game_log: Captain Drake: I've been searching for someone brave enough to help.
Captain Drake: In the Obsidian Pit, you must Search Obsidian Pit for the hidden Crystal Key. Rumors say it was sealed away behind deadly traps.
Captain Drake: Will you take on this challenge?
Captain Drake: Thank you, brave souls! I've marked the Obsidian Pit on your map. Be careful out there!

Dame Isolde: I've been searching for someone brave enough to help.
